Messari provides crypto research, analytics, fundamentals, intelligence,
and asset profiles via a REST API at data.messari.io. Endpoints cover
assets, markets, networks, exchanges, protocols, news/events, token
unlocks, monitoring/watchlists, AI chat completions, research reports,
and bulk datasets. Authentication is via the x-messari-api-key header.
